scripts.render:teaser: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts TeaserPromo ../assets/levelup-promo-teaser.mp4 --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:square: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts SquarePromo ../assets/levelup-promo-square.mp4 --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:extended: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts ExtendedPromo30 ../assets/levelup-promo-30s.mp4 --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:widescreen: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts WidescreenPromo ../assets/levelup-promo-widescreen.mp4 --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:widescreen:props: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts WidescreenPromo ../assets/levelup-promo-widescreen.mp4 --props=./widescreen-promo-props.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:widescreen:voice: npm run generate:voiceover && npm run render:widescreen
scripts.render:feature:epic: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts FeaturePromoEpic ../assets/levelup-promo-feature-epic.mp4 --props=./feature-promo-props/epic.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:feature:warm: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts FeaturePromoWarm ../assets/levelup-promo-feature-warm.mp4 --props=./feature-promo-props/warm.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:feature:pro: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts FeaturePromoPro ../assets/levelup-promo-feature-pro.mp4 --props=./feature-promo-props/pro.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:feature:hype: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts FeaturePromoHype ../assets/levelup-promo-feature-hype.mp4 --props=./feature-promo-props/hype.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:feature:story: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/run-below-normal.ps1 -Command "npx remotion render src/index.ts FeaturePromoStory ../assets/levelup-promo-feature-story.mp4 --props=./feature-promo-props/story.json --concurrency=1"
scripts.render:feature:all: npm run render:feature:epic && npm run render:feature:warm && npm run render:feature:pro && npm run render:feature:hype && npm run render:feature:story
scripts.render:new: npm run render:teaser && npm run render:square && npm run render:extended
